sourceRegistryNote: Phase 1 redeploy of the EXTENDED SourceRegistry (invalidateSignal, signalAt, typed SignalDecoded) — D-31. Source-verified. Supersedes the Phase 0 skeleton at 0x97a724ca8d70aee206b8d56925a735511d3cd5c8. This is the single source of truth the agent + reconciler + Phase 2 read; registerSource runs at mint time (01-06). agentId is added by registerIdentity.ts at mint.
venueNote: Self-deployed canonical Uniswap V3 fork (D-43). FusionX V3 is NOT on chain 5003. fee=3000 / tickSpacing 60. Deployed by script/DeployPhase1.s.sol.
mockVerificationNote: All 4 mocks are the same MockERC20 contract, so Mantlescan source-verifies mUSDC as a clean 'Exact Match' and bytecode-matches mWMNT/mMETH/mWETH to it as 'Similar Match' + a cosmetic 'Constructor' warning. EXPECTED and harmless — all 4 are source-verified and functionally correct. Do NOT 'fix' by redeploying distinctly-named mocks; it would change token+pool addresses for zero functional gain (reviewed + accepted 2026-06-11). In the demo, point at the green source-verified checkmark, not the similarity badge.

seedPrices.note: D-20 mainnet-like reference prices (USDC per token). WMNT pool ~5k USDC depth; mETH/WETH pools ~25k USDC depth (deviation from D-19's literal 5k so a $3200 asset has realistic single-token depth).
